thread.title: UP Bypoll results: CM hails Modi for BJP win, says Opp\u2019s loot politics nearing end
thread.title_full: UP Bypoll results: CM hails Modi for BJP win, says Opp\u2019s loot politics nearing end

author: PTI
title: UP Bypoll results: CM hails Modi for BJP win, says Opp\u2019s loot politics nearing end
text: Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath on Saturday credited Prime Minister Narendra Modi for the BJP's victory in the Uttar Pradesh by-elections, saying the results made it clear that SP-INDIA bloc's politics of 'loot and lies' is coming to an end. The bypolls were held in nine assembly seats. Till 4.30 pm, according to the Election Commission, the BJP had won Ghaziabad, Khair and Phulpur seats while its candidates and RLD ally had secured a decisive lead in Katehari, Majhawan, Kundarki and Meerapur. Opposition Samajwadi Party won Sisamau and Karhal. “If we look at Uttar Pradesh, elections were held in nine assembly constituencies spread across the state, and the BJP alliance has emerged victorious in seven of them," Adityanath said during a press conference flanked by party state president Bhupendra Chaudhary and Deputy Chief Ministers Keshav Prasad Maurya and Brajesh Pathak. “The credit for this historic victory goes to the visionary leadership of Prime Minister Narendra Modi. His exemplary leadership continues to steer the double-engine government toward ensuring security, good governance, and prosperity, while inspiring us to implement welfare schemes effectively on the ground," Adityanath said. “This resounding mandate reflects people's unwavering trust in PM Modi's leadership. The public firmly believes that his policies and decisions are aligned with the best interests of the nation and society, and this belief has been reaffirmed through this election," he said. Extending congratulations to all the dedicated BJP workers, office-bearers, and winning candidates, the CM said, “Their hard work has been instrumental in achieving this success.” He said the country has witnessed an exceptional alignment of heritage and development under Modi's leadership. “The model o is evident to all of us today. What was once a dream is becoming a reality now. The victory in UP stands as a testament to the commitment of the people of the state to supporting Prime Minister Modi's vision and campaigns," he said.
